Appearances:
Plaintiff TheTtides Center is present. Represented by Lois Butler.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Scott Keller is present.
Attorney Catherine Danielson representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-12-2011 remains on calendar.
